scenario.task: Grasp the green box. Be delicate. Do not push the red box.

response_parsed.Precondition: red_block is on top of green_block and both end-effectors are free.
response_parsed.Postcondition: red_block is securely grasped with both end-effectors.

response_parsed.Precondition: red_block is held by both end-effectors and a free area to the right of green_block on the table is available.
response_parsed.Postcondition: red_block is placed on the table to the right of green_block and both end-effectors are released.

response_parsed.Precondition: green_block is fully accessible on the table and the right end-effector is free.
response_parsed.Postcondition: green_block is grasped by the right end-effector.
